description.zh: 嘿！你来得正是时候。Lightkeeper又给你派活儿了...我给你说点老实话，你可以保密吗？我可不知道接下来还有多少这样的任务。按计划来说，我想我现在已经和灯塔的那位商人达成合作关系了。但是不知道为什么，我们在一次又一次地证明着自己的诚意，做出一副我们很忠诚的样子。而且，把你拖下水的也正是我...这次是什么任务呢？进入实验室，解决掉一些掠夺者。这还没完。你还需要寻找一些兴奋剂。Lightkeeper看起来对这些东西非常感兴趣，因为USEC曾经出于某些原因拒绝给他提供样品。我知道这绝非易事，但我们都做到这个地步了。我不知道该怎么拒绝这个差事。
description.en: Oh, hey! You're just in time. There's another job for you from Lightkeeper... Can I tell you something frankly, so that it doesn't go out the door? I don't know how many more of these missions there will be. I thought I'd get in touch with the trader at the Lighthouse and make a partnership agreement. But for some reason we have to prove our loyalty over and over again, to demonstrate the steadfastness of our intentions. And it was I who got you into this... What's the mission? Getting into the laboratory, taking out a group of Raiders. And that's not all. You need to find combat stimulants. Lightkeeper seems to have a keen interest in them, because USEC refused to give him samples for some reason. I understand that it might not be easy, but we've already come this far. I just can't refuse.
